home.heroLine: Visual storytelling through movement, shadow, and atmosphere.
home.heroSub: Artistic video work focused on dance, performance, and expressive spaces.
home.ethosTitle: My work is built on trust, collaboration, and respect.
home.ethosBody: The strongest visuals come from a comfortable, open creative environment. Every project begins with understanding your vision and building a space where you feel safe, supported, and confident to express yourself.
home.ctaBody: Available for on-location filming across Central Europe.

films.title: Films
films.intro: Short-form cinematic work in dance, performance, modelling, and events.

stills.title: Stills
stills.note: A new gallery is on the way. Reach out to see the full set.

about.title: An artist behind and in front of the camera.
about.body: I am a videographer, dancer, and content creator based in Brno, Czech Republic. With experience on both sides of the lens, I bring a collaborative, intuitive approach to every project, telling visual stories through composition, movement, and atmosphere. Expect a professional yet relaxed environment and video work tailored to each client.
about.reach: Available for on-location filming across Central Europe.

services.title: Services
services.intro: Each package includes consultation, planning, filming, and full post-production with professional colour grading.
services.priceNote: Final pricing depends on shoot duration, scope, and deliverables.

items.name: Modelling & artistic shoots
items.summary: Creative video shoots in artistic environments and curated backdrops, from consultation through to a fully graded edit.

items.name: Workshops & classes
items.summary: On-location filming that captures the energy and atmosphere of a dance class or workshop, all equipment brought to you.

items.name: Dance & choreography
items.summary: A collaborative, one-on-one approach for artistic dance and choreography videos made for social platforms.

contact.title: Let's talk about your project.
contact.body: Tell me a little about what you have in mind and I'll be in touch shortly.
contact.name: Name
contact.errorEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
contact.errorMessage: Tell me a little more — at least 10 characters.
contact.successBody: Thanks, {name}. I've got your details and I'll be in touch shortly.

book.title: Reserve a consultation.
book.body: Book a free consultation or a video service. No online payment is required at this stage; payment is arranged directly after booking confirmation.
book.embedNote: The booking calendar will appear here.
book.terms: By booking, you agree to the applicable Terms & Conditions.

terms.title: Terms & Conditions
terms.body: Terms and conditions will be published here.

footer.tagline: Cinematic video for movement, shadow, and atmosphere.
